summary: Comprehensive backend testing of AUREM BOS (Business Operating System) - All 33 tests passing after fixing MongoDB database object truth value testing issues

fixed_during_testing.issue: MongoDB database objects do not implement truth value testing
fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed 'if db:' to 'if db is not None:' and 'if not db:' to 'if db is None:'

fixed_during_testing.issue: AUREM BOS routers not initialized with database in startup event
fixed_during_testing.fix: Added set_db calls for business_routes, premium_routes, system_routes, digest_routes in startup event
Changed '**metadata if metadata else {}' to '**(metadata if metadata else {})'

critical_code_review_comments: All AUREM BOS features are working correctly after fixes
Circuit breakers (13 total) are properly protecting external services
Daily Digest orchestrator pattern is functional with AI-powered summaries
Premium features (Follow-Up, Coexistence, Multi-Modal) are operational
Business management CRUD operations work correctly
seed_data_creation: Test events created in aurem_digest_events collection, test businesses created in memory
context_for_next_testing_agent: All AUREM BOS backend APIs are working. Fixed MongoDB truth value testing issues across multiple files. The business management uses in-memory storage for businesses, so created businesses may not persist to database. All 33 tests pass including: System Status, Circuit Breakers, Daily Digest, Premium Follow-Up, WhatsApp Coexistence, Multi-Modal Processing, Business Management, and OmniDimension.
